articles.title: To celebrate 3 million weekly codex users, we are resetting usage limits.
articles.summary:
We will do this every million users up to 10 million.

Happy building!
articles.author: @sama

articles.title: Three million people are now using Codex weekly - up from two million a little under a month ago. Incredible to see the growth. Thank you to all of you and to the ecosystem we’re part of. To celebrate, we’re resetting rate limits so you can keep building, and we’ll reset them every additional 1M users until we reach 10M, so we can keep celebrating along the way.
articles.author: @thsottiaux

articles.title: 真心建议每个程序员都去手搓一个自用的 Coding Agent。
articles.summary:
纯靠写 Prompt 糊文本做 Skill，观测性太差了，你根本摸不到 harness 模型的上限在哪。缺乏 Agent 的状态流转做约束，复杂任务根本控不住。

最近用 AI 搓了个 mini 版的 Claude Code，对 Agent 的理解稍微升了点。

PS: 我经常从 Gemini / GPT-5.4 蒸馏 SOP Skill，再下放给 @MiniMax_AI 模型来跑任务. 建议可以…
